name: claude-docs-mgmt
description: Self-contained marketplace for the claude-docs-mgmt plugin — project framework with docs scaffold, code-standards defaults, and a docs-drift audit.

plugins.name: claude-docs-mgmt
plugins.description: Bootstraps a project's docs (/init-docs), ships a code-standards.md rulebook (modularity / TDD / anti-overengineering), audits docs for drift (/docs-sync), and blocks /compact on a dirty tree until docs are synced.
